# Omar Al-Bakri — Applied AI Engineer

I spent fifteen years explaining technology. Then I learned to build it.

Omar Al-Bakri builds AI systems for financial services. He learned Python and TypeScript in his forties after fifteen years in enterprise FinTech sales across Tier 1 banks and payments infrastructure. His work spans agent systems, full-stack products, retrieval, evaluation and production delivery.

Bangkok-based · open to remote roles, consulting and contracting globally

## Remote roles

Open to remote roles across applied AI, product engineering, automation and financial services. Omar can join an existing team, strengthen a defined workstream or help move a product from idea to working system.

## Consulting and contracting

Defined AI products, agent workflows and production integrations with a clear delivery surface.

## Selected systems

### CallScore — Live product

CallScore extracts public creator market calls, matches them to timestamped price outcomes and scores evidence-backed performance.

### ruleIQ — Production-ready repository

ruleIQ connects regulatory obligations to controls, evidence, retrieval and human review.

### Helios — Private build

Helios coordinates B2B prospecting, enrichment and outreach through a desktop operator surface, MCP services, graph memory and CRM integrations.

### thredOS — Pre-launch

thredOS provides a local-first operating model for agent workflows with dependencies, gates, approvals, runs and provenance.

## Intelligent Rails

Analysis of payments, financial infrastructure and applied AI.
